description: Rust program where http2_only() and serve_connection() only exist in a file guarded by cfg(bench). The production main.rs never calls the vulnerable functions. CVE-2023-26964 should be not_affected since the vulnerable code path is excluded from normal builds.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: http2_only() and serve_connection() only appear in bench_http2.rs behind #[cfg(bench)]. Production main.rs does not call any vulnerable function.

findings.human_justification: http2_only() and serve_connection() are only present in bench_http2.rs with #[cfg(bench)] constraint. The production binary never includes this code path.
